name: YouTube Channel Analytics
description: Retrieves a daily views line chart for your YouTube channel using the YouTube Analytics API.

input_schema.name: start_date
input_schema.label: Start Date
input_schema.description: Report start date in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g. 2025-01-01)

input_schema.name: end_date
input_schema.label: End Date
input_schema.description: Report end date in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g. 2025-12-31)

input_schema.name: YOUTUBE_ANALYTICS_TOKEN
input_schema.label: OAuth Access Token env var name
input_schema.description:
Set Up YouTube Analytics API Access

1. Go to the Google Cloud Console (console.cloud.google.com)
2. Create or select a project, then enable the "YouTube Analytics API"
3. Go to Credentials → Create Credentials → OAuth 2.0 Client ID (Desktop app)
4. Use the OAuth 2.0 Playground (oauth2.googleapis.com/tokeninfo) or your preferred OAuth flow to obtain an access token with the scope:
   https://www.googleapis.com/auth/yt-analytics.readonly
5. Set the token as an environment variable and enter its name here
